name: rldyour-security
description: Skills-only security guidance for Codex: OWASP Top 10 implementation comments and defensive ry-sec-review.

interface.shortDescription: OWASP guidance and defensive security review
interface.longDescription: This skills-only plugin adds non-blocking security guidance for Codex. owasp-top-10-implementation keeps implementation work aligned with OWASP Top 10 2025, ASVS 5.0.0, and secure coding checklist principles without stopping normal development. ry-sec-review performs a defensive, hypothesis-driven security review inspired by Mythos-style application security review: recon, hypothesis generation, source-to-sink tracing, exploitability assessment, confidence ranking, remediation, and verification. The plugin does not configure MCP servers, does not add hooks, and does not block execution except where normal Codex safety rules apply to explicit destructive or malicious requests.
defaultPrompt: Apply OWASP Top 10 guidance while implementing this feature.
Review this diff for security risks.
